Coldplay Favourites

Published May 13, 2020

Share

  • Facebook
  • Telegram

I love listening to Coldplay!!

Here is a chota compilation of my not so common faves! I hope you like it!

  • Another’s Arms
  • Talk
  • Swallowed in the Sea
  • Ghost Story
  • Strawberry Swing
  • Midnight
  • Birds
  • Gravity
  • Til Kingdom Come
  • Church
